ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "provider_city" TEXT /* City where the provider is located */,
  "provider_state" TEXT /* State where the provider is located */,
  "provider_zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the provider's location */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., hospital, clinic, private practice) */,
  "provider_rating" REAL /* Rating or quality score of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the provider */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the provider's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the provider was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drgs" (
  "drg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DRG */,
  "drg_definition" TEXT /* Definition of the diagnosis-related group */,
  "drg_category" TEXT /* Category of the DRG (e.g., surgical, medical) */,
  "drg_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the DRG */,
  "drg_weight" REAL /* Weight or complexity of the DRG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referral_regions" (
  "referral_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hospital referral region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of referral region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the referral region */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the referral region */,
  "healthcare_ranking" INTEGER /* Healthcare ranking of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "drg_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the DRG */,
  "referral_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referral region */,
  "total_discharges" INTEGER /* Total number of discharges for the DRG */,
  "average_covered_charges" REAL /* Average covered charges for the DRG */,
  "average_total_payments" REAL /* Average total payments for the DRG */,
  "average_medicare_payments" REAL /* Average Medicare payments for the DRG */,
  "oop_payment" REAL /* Out-of-pocket payment for the DRG */,
  "payment_coverage" REAL /* Payment coverage percentage */,
  "medicare_pct_paid" REAL /* Percentage of Medicare paid */,
  "region_avg_medicare_paid" REAL /* Average Medicare payment for the region */,
  "medicare_paid_ratio" REAL /* Medicare payment ratio */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the provider */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit for the provider */,
  "cost_per_discharge" REAL /* Average cost per discharge */,
  "revenue_growth_rate" REAL /* Revenue growth rate */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_referral_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("referral_region_id") REFERENCES referral_regions ("referral_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_drg_id FOREIGN KEY ("drg_id") REFERENCES drgs ("drg_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial data entry */,
  "total_discharge_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of total discharges */,
  "ratio_average_covered_charges" REAL /* Ratio of average covered charges */,
  "ratio_average_total_payment" REAL /* Ratio of average total payments */,
  "ratio_average_medicare_payments" REAL /* Ratio of average Medicare payments */,
  "ratio_oop_payment" REAL /* Ratio of out-of-pocket payments */,
  "ratio_oop_payment_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of out-of-pocket payment to total payment */,
  "ratio_payment_coverage" REAL /* Ratio of payment coverage */,
  "ratio_medicare_pct_paid" REAL /* Ratio of Medicare percentage paid */,
  "revenue_growth_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of revenue growth */,
  "profit_margin_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of profit margin */,
  "cost_per_discharge_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of cost per discharge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_financial_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., provider, admin, analyst) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_financial_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("financial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
